jokes.text: What is my rent even going to?
jokes.setup: Abbi complaining about having to use bug bombs instead of landlord hiring exterminator
jokes.punchline: Questioning what her rent money is actually paying for
jokes.explanation: Relatable NYC rental frustration, economically delivered but predictable

jokes.text: everyone in the building can just, like, mass murder all their own cockroaches
jokes.setup: Discussing the coordinated bug bombing
jokes.punchline: Framing pest control as 'mass murder'
jokes.explanation: Dark humor twist on mundane activity, fits Abbi's overthinking nature

jokes.text: That... that's what that is, 4:00. Okay, I knew that.
jokes.setup: Ilana using military time '1600 hours'
jokes.punchline: Abbi pretending she understood military time when she clearly didn't
jokes.explanation: Classic Abbi insecurity moment, well-timed awkwardness

jokes.text: Zero dark thirty! Zero dark 29! Zero dark 28!... Zero dark zero! Go! Go! Go!
jokes.setup: Coordinated bug bombing requires precise timing
jokes.punchline: Ilana treating it like a military operation with dramatic countdown
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana energy - turning mundane into absurd spectacle, great escalation

jokes.text: It's like an insect holocaust in here or something. It would make us Mr. and Mrs. Hit... Hitler.
jokes.setup: Jeremy commenting on the smell of dead bugs
jokes.punchline: Awkward Nazi comparison that he immediately regrets
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable dark humor that lands awkwardly as intended, fits Jeremy's character

jokes.text: Like Nazis? Yeah, like the... I mean, I just was... Yeah, have a good 24 hours.
jokes.setup: Jeremy's Hitler comment
jokes.punchline: His immediate panic and awkward exit
jokes.explanation: Good cringe payoff to the setup, realistic awkward recovery

jokes.text: It's in my mouth!
jokes.setup: Bug spray aftermath in apartment
jokes.punchline: Abbi getting bug spray residue in her mouth
jokes.explanation: Simple physical comedy, economical delivery but predictable

jokes.text: Spread out the Bed Bath & Beyond lectures.
jokes.setup: Abbi enthusiastically talking about store return policy
jokes.punchline: Ilana's dry acknowledgment of Abbi's consumer obsession
jokes.explanation: Perfect dynamic between characters, economical and character-specific

jokes.text: Great, you should tell me more while I transform my room into a walk-in closet.
jokes.setup: Abbi wanting to continue talking about Bed Bath & Beyond
jokes.punchline: Ilana sarcastically offering to multitask with her ridiculous project
jokes.explanation: Good sarcastic deflection that reveals character priorities

jokes.text: It's gonna take you three months, like everything does.
jokes.setup: Ilana claiming her closet project will take ten minutes
jokes.punchline: Abbi's knowing assessment of Ilana's time management
jokes.explanation: Excellent friendship dynamic, economical burn that feels earned

jokes.text: This is the biggest moment of our lives. It's my life, but... I mean, you're with... you're with me.
jokes.setup: Abbi trying to make her art show sound important to both of them
jokes.punchline: Her awkward realization that it's really just about her
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Abbi's self-absorption and self-awareness

jokes.text: I'll Nair, like, a bunch of different areas.
jokes.setup: Abbi listing her pre-gallery preparation
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning hair removal in multiple unspecified body areas
jokes.explanation: Casual oversharing that feels natural for the character relationship

jokes.text: but it's white people problems, so let's see if you can keep it in perspective.
jokes.setup: Ilana about to deliver bad news
jokes.punchline: Pre-emptively framing it as privileged complaining
jokes.explanation: Smart self-aware humor about privilege, well-timed setup

jokes.text: Okay, first of all, I'm allowed to be upset even though I'm white. Typical honky.
jokes.setup: Ilana's comment about white people problems
jokes.punchline: Abbi defending herself then immediately calling herself a honky
jokes.explanation: Excellent self-deprecating turn, good structure with the contradiction

jokes.text: He is in Vermont for a straight wedding.
jokes.setup: Asking if Jaime is home
jokes.punchline: Specifying it's a 'straight' wedding, implying that's noteworthy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana perspective, economical and character-specific

jokes.text: We have street smarts.
jokes.setup: Abbi refusing to call a locksmith
jokes.punchline: Claiming they have street smarts when they clearly don't
jokes.explanation: Good ironic character moment, sets up their inevitable failures

jokes.text: Use the wood, dude. Oh, my God, all right. Wood, I mean... Jesus!
jokes.setup: Attempting to break into the building
jokes.punchline: Confusion and failure with their 'street smart' plan
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy setup, predictable but establishes their incompetence

jokes.text: Sorry, I released too early.
jokes.setup: Failing at the fire escape climbing attempt
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo in innocent context
jokes.explanation: Classic accidental innuendo, well-timed but not groundbreaking

jokes.text: dude, I work at a gym. There are so many upper-body strength classes.
jokes.setup: Failing at a basic pull-up
jokes.punchline: Abbi's incredulity at her own weakness despite working at a gym
jokes.explanation: Good character irony, highlights the gap between aspiration and reality

jokes.text: You just went up inside me. Okay. That's just what happened. It was honestly not intentional. It was natural for me.
jokes.setup: Physical comedy during fire escape attempt
jokes.punchline: Awkward sexual implications of their climbing failure
jokes.explanation: Effective awkward humor from physical comedy gone wrong

jokes.text: who would you rather have go down on you? Michael Buble or Janet Jackson?
jokes.setup: Random topic change after awkward moment
jokes.punchline: Extremely random and graphic 'would you rather' question
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana randomness, absurd topic change that fits her character perfectly

jokes.text: What Buble are we talking about, though? I don't know, the optimal Michael Buble. His weight fluctuates. Yeah. So does hers. Yeah. So does mine.
jokes.setup: Abbi actually engaging with the ridiculous question
jokes.punchline: Detailed analysis of celebrities' weight fluctuations affecting the hypothetical
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation - treating the absurd question with serious analysis makes it funnier

jokes.text: Michael Buble is, like, such a crooner. I feel like he could do stuff with his mouth that, like, most people couldn't.
jokes.setup: Discussing Buble vs Janet Jackson
jokes.punchline: Abbi seriously analyzing the sexual implications of being a crooner
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment - Abbi overthinking even sexual hypotheticals

jokes.text: Somebody call a locksmith?
jokes.setup: Girls struggling to get into building
jokes.punchline: Locksmith appearing at perfect comedic timing
jokes.explanation: Good timing and structure, though predictable plot device

jokes.text: Yolanda.
jokes.setup: Locksmith asking for her name
jokes.punchline: Abbi giving a clearly fake name for no apparent reason
jokes.explanation: Perfect neurotic Abbi moment, unnecessarily lying to a service person

jokes.text: the only thing you need to be a locksmith is you gotta want it. Real bad.
jokes.setup: Asked about credentials
jokes.punchline: Claiming locksmithing requires only desire, not training
jokes.explanation: Great creepy character moment, absurd but believable response

jokes.text: They call this a whore door. 'Cause it's so easy.
jokes.setup: Working on the lock
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate sexual metaphor for door security
jokes.explanation: Perfectly inappropriate for the creepy character, economical and uncomfortable

jokes.text: Thank you for your terrifying services and don't call us, we'll call you.
jokes.setup: Locksmith successfully opening door but being creepy
jokes.punchline: Politely dismissing him while acknowledging he was scary
jokes.explanation: Good character response, polite but firm dismissal with self-awareness

jokes.text: Look at this gorgeous immigrant family.
jokes.setup: Looking at family photos in wrong apartment
jokes.punchline: Patronizing comment about family she's never met
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Abbi's unconscious condescension

jokes.text: I'd know him in and up and all around.
jokes.setup: Discussing knowing neighbor Jeremy
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo about getting to know Jeremy
jokes.explanation: Casual sexual reference, fits the character dynamic

jokes.text: Cute little Mexican candies. They're Nerds.
jokes.setup: Ilana commenting on candy in apartment
jokes.punchline: Abbi's matter-of-fact correction
jokes.explanation: Simple observational humor, economical but not particularly clever

jokes.text: I am the problem. I am gentrification, you know. In three generations, gentrification is gonna be a non-issue because statistically, we're headed toward an age where everybody's gonna be like caramel and queer
jokes.setup: Realizing she's in someone else's apartment
jokes.punchline: Bizarre tangent about future racial and sexual demographics
jokes.explanation: Peak Abbi overthinking, brilliant absurd tangent from guilt

jokes.text: I'm gonna shoot you in your face! Wait, wait! I can prove that I live here, okay?
jokes.setup: Neighbor discovering them in apartment
jokes.punchline: Immediate threat followed by desperate negotiation attempt
jokes.explanation: Good escalation and panic, realistic reaction sequence

jokes.text: Three... three months ago, that old white dude was found chopped up in our dumpster.
jokes.setup: Trying to prove she lives in the building
jokes.punchline: Using a murder as proof of residency
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark humor, perfect escalation of desperation

jokes.text: Last week, one of you farted and I heard it 'cause the walls are so thin and I laughed and then you heard me, so you laughed. That did happen.
jokes.setup: Continuing to prove residency
jokes.punchline: Incredibly intimate and embarrassing shared memory
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation, perfectly awkward and specific proof

jokes.text: Now that I say it out loud, I realize I led the creepy dude to your apartment and I am so sorry.
jokes.setup: Explaining how they got into wrong apartment
jokes.punchline: Abbi's dawning realization of how terrible her plan was
jokes.explanation: Great character moment of belated self-awareness

jokes.text: 'Cause of the... I threw up. 'Cause of the... It was because of the mace.
jokes.setup: Getting maced by the neighbor
jokes.punchline: Ilana's disoriented explanation of vomiting
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy payoff, predictable but functional

jokes.text: Ben Affleck was homeless for a night for charity. We're, like, doing that, just involuntarily.
jokes.setup: Being temporarily homeless
jokes.punchline: Comparing their situation to celebrity charity stunt
jokes.explanation: Good observational humor with nice ironic twist

jokes.text: Yeah, we're just a regular Matt and Ben.
jokes.setup: Abbi's Ben Affleck reference
jokes.punchline: Extending the metaphor to Matt Damon friendship
jokes.explanation: Good callback extension, economical and fits the friendship theme

jokes.text: honestly, probably look better than if we hadn't been maced 'cause our pores are tight and burning. It's like we had a chemical peel.
jokes.setup: Trying to shower at gym after being maced
jokes.punchline: Finding beauty benefits in assault with chemical weapon
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd optimism, perfect Abbi character moment

jokes.text: I was doing park our just now.
jokes.setup: Trey asking about her maced face
jokes.punchline: Abbi lying about doing parkour to explain injuries
jokes.explanation: Good character lie, sets up extended parkour sequence

jokes.text: Using the city as your gym, very solstice.
jokes.setup: Abbi claiming to do parkour
jokes.punchline: Trey using 'solstice' incorrectly as an adjective
jokes.explanation: Perfect fitness bro character moment, economical and specific

jokes.text: I wish I was as strong as you. I mean, sometimes I just go to Quizno's and I go nuts.
jokes.setup: Praising Abbi's dedication to fitness
jokes.punchline: Confessing his weakness is eating at Quizno's
jokes.explanation: Good character-specific weakness, unexpected food choice

jokes.text: You're afraid of your own failure. Abbi, park our is terrifying, I know. But you've got to get back on that urban jungle.
jokes.setup: Abbi trying to avoid doing more parkour
jokes.punchline: Trey's motivational speech mixing psychology with urban athletics
jokes.explanation: Perfect trainer character moment, earnest but absurd

jokes.text: Show me a tic-tac on the hydrant.
jokes.setup: Trey teaching Abbi parkour moves
jokes.punchline: Using made-up parkour terminology
jokes.explanation: Great fake parkour jargon, economical and character-specific

jokes.text: That's a good hostage, okay. Come down and do a spit roast.
jokes.setup: Continuing parkour instruction
jokes.punchline: More bizarre fake parkour moves with unfortunate sexual connotations
jokes.explanation: Brilliant innocent/sexual double meaning, perfect character obliviousness

jokes.text: Picabo Street.
jokes.setup: Encouraging Abbi's parkour attempts
jokes.punchline: Random reference to Olympic skier as parkour praise
jokes.explanation: Perfectly random reference, economical and fits trainer character perfectly

jokes.text: You gotta be lying down to be really homeless.
jokes.setup: Abbi saying they're homeless
jokes.punchline: Ilana's bizarre logic about homelessness requirements
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ilana logic, absurd but delivered with confidence

jokes.text: The plastic bags are for swimsuits and, like, dirty gym clothes, not for loose goo.
jokes.setup: Discovering Ilana stole lotion in plastic bags
jokes.punchline: Abbi's disgusted but specific correction about bag usage
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Abbi's rule-following nature

jokes.text: This is a sandwich shop.
jokes.setup: Arriving at what Abbi thought was a gallery
jokes.punchline: Devastating realization about the venue
jokes.explanation: Perfect dramatic deflation, economical and devastating

jokes.text: it's a gallery after 8:00 'cause they make people put their laptops away.
jokes.setup: Abbi realizing it's just a sandwich shop
jokes.punchline: Ilana's desperate rationalization based on laptop policy
jokes.explanation: Perfect supportive friend logic, absurd but well-intentioned

jokes.text: One of the sandwich artists? No, I'm one of the... the artist artists.
jokes.setup: Employee asking if she's a sandwich artist
jokes.punchline: Abbi's awkward distinction between types of artists
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay on Subway terminology, awkward but character-appropriate

jokes.text: people don't really come in here for the art. We're a sandwich shop. So we sell food.
jokes.setup: Abbi asking about art sales
jokes.punchline: Employee's matter-of-fact explanation of business model
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan reality check, economical and grounding

jokes.text: Abbi sent me a Facebook invite to her gallery debut. Do you... look... crazy? Mm-hmm. Yeah, I do.
jokes.setup: Lincoln arriving and seeing Ilana's disheveled state
jokes.punchline: Honest assessment of her appearance after the day's disasters
jokes.explanation: Simple visual gag about their disheveled appearance

jokes.text: I got, like, six cavities.
jokes.setup: Lincoln saying he's not a perfect dentist
jokes.punchline: Admitting to having multiple cavities as a dental professional
jokes.explanation: Good professional irony, character-specific and economical

jokes.text: The keys to my apartment. Don't you ever tell Abbi.
jokes.setup: Ilana has been blaming lockout situation on circumstances
jokes.punchline: Revealing she had the keys all along
jokes.explanation: Great reveal that recontextualizes entire episode, perfect Ilana chaos

jokes.text: Your brain is a muscle, Ilana, and I feel like that muscle isn't getting enough exercise. You need to do your brain kegels.
jokes.setup: Lincoln lecturing Ilana about forgetting keys
jokes.punchline: Comparing mental exercise to kegel exercises
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd metaphor, highly quotable and character-specific

jokes.text: We're actually a vegan sandwich place. I mean, I guess it's, like, ironic or something.
jokes.setup: Abbi's hamburger drawing on wall of sandwich shop
jokes.punchline: Employee's casual observation about the irony
jokes.explanation: Mild ironic observation, functional but not particularly clever

jokes.text: Because then I would be closeted.
jokes.setup: Reconsidering the walk-in closet plan
jokes.punchline: Realizing the sexual identity implications of living in a closet
jokes.explanation: Excellent wordplay, perfect for Ilana's character and sexuality awareness

jokes.text: When a friend makes a mistake, you forgive them blindly, right?
jokes.setup: Abbi apologizing for being difficult
jokes.punchline: Establishing principle of blind forgiveness (ironic given Ilana's secret)
jokes.explanation: Ironic given what audience knows about Ilana's keys, good friendship moment

jokes.text: They started out as kid detectives, just solving mysteries in Bayport and now they have an entire book series about them. Yeah, definitely, but you know, they are, like, fictional characters
jokes.setup: Lincoln encouraging Abbi about her art career
jokes.punchline: Abbi pointing out the Hardy Boys aren't real
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of motivational speech, realistic response

jokes.text: You can take your cut of the proceeds, which are 17.50, or you can get a credit for, like, three sandwiches.
jokes.setup: Abbi's drawing apparently sold
jokes.punchline: Revealing the pathetically small amount and sandwich alternative
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of artistic success, economical reality check

jokes.text: And there's no meat. No. Okay, how big are the sandwiches? Like, substantial? We... Sometimes.
jokes.setup: Abbi learning about sandwich credit limitations
jokes.punchline: Employee's uncertain response about sandwich size
jokes.explanation: Decent escalation of the poor value proposition

jokes.text: Do you know what a sandwich is? Do you? 'Cause you don't have any meat in them. There's no meat in the sandwiches. Just an FYI, that makes the sandwich.
jokes.setup: Abbi questioning sandwich quality and size
jokes.punchline: Escalating argument about sandwich definition
jokes.explanation: Good character frustration escalation, shows Abbi's food conservatism

jokes.text: Two of my favorite things. Art and Abbi? Um, hamburgers and Abbi.
jokes.setup: Jeremy commenting on buying Abbi's hamburger drawing
jokes.punchline: Awkward correction revealing his priorities
jokes.explanation: Good awkward Jeremy moment, reveals character priorities

jokes.text: Yolanda.
jokes.setup: Locksmith appearing outside apartment building
jokes.punchline: Calling out the fake name Abbi gave him earlier
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback that creates immediate dread - economical and effective

jokes.text: I wanna pick your little keyhole...
jokes.setup: Locksmith returning and calling Abbi 'Yolanda'
jokes.punchline: Sexual innuendo using locksmith terminology
jokes.explanation: Effective creepy callback, maintains character threat level

jokes.text: Yolanda! No! Yolanda! Why?
jokes.setup: Locksmith pursuing Abbi
jokes.punchline: Abbi's panicked screaming using her fake name
jokes.explanation: Good callback payoff, maintains the absurd stakes of her lie
